majorTraces.name: Heat Vent
majorTraces.description: When Firefly is in Complete Combustion state, her CRIT Rate increases by 15% and CRIT DMG increases by 30%.

majorTraces.name: Molten Core
majorTraces.description: When Firefly's current HP is 50% or lower, her DMG increases by 40%.

majorTraces.name: Fuel Injection
majorTraces.description: After entering Complete Combustion state, Firefly's Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 50% for 3 turns.
